title: Claude Mythos 5 + Fable 5 Are Here And The Numbers Are INSANE
summary: Chase AI reviews the release of Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5, noting impressive performance numbers and pricing concerns. Fable 5 is available free on most Claude subscription tiers through June 22, after which it will require usage credits, with plans to restore it as a standard feature as capacity allows.
writeup: Chase AI reviews the release of Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5, covering the reported performance numbers and the pricing structure around access. Fable 5 is free on most Claude subscription tiers through June 22, after which it shifts to usage credits, with plans to restore it as a standard feature as capacity allows. The takeaway is a launch where strong benchmarks come paired with capacity and pricing constraints that shape how the model can be used.
